Container.Name: bulwark
Container.Overview: A modern, self-hosted webmail client for Stalwart Mail Server, built with Next.js and the JMAP protocol. JMAP Webmail built for the 21st Century. A modern, self-hosted email client for Stalwart Mail Server powered by the JMAP protocol. Email, calendar, contacts and files. Fast, private, and open source. https://bulwarkmail.org https://github.com/bulwarkmail/webmail

Config.Name: Admin Data
Config.Description: Persistent admin and extension marketplace data

Config.Name: HOSTNAME
Config.Description: Bind address. Use :: for dual-stack IPv6.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal listen port for the Bulwark container

Config.Name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Admin password for Bulwark management features

Config.Name: APP_NAME
Config.Description: Application name shown in the UI

Config.Name: JMAP_SERVER_URL
Config.Description: URL of the JMAP-compatible mail server

Config.Name: STALWART_FEATURES
Config.Description: Enable Stalwart-specific features such as password changes and sieve filters

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Secret used to encrypt remembered sessions and synced settings. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: SETTINGS_DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Path inside the container where encrypted settings are stored

Config.Name: LOGIN_LOGO_LIGHT_URL
Config.Description: Logo displayed on the login page in light mode

Config.Name: LOGIN_LOGO_DARK_URL
Config.Description: Logo displayed on the login page in dark mode

Config.Name: LOGIN_COMPANY_NAME
Config.Description: Company or organization name shown on the login page

Config.Name: LOGIN_WEBSITE_URL
Config.Description: Website link shown on the login page
